creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
You have 33 ports out of date according to portscout, there are multiple tickets open and unresolved.

Why are you once again doing questionable license changes? https://codeberg.org/BSDforge/dnsbalancer/src/branch/main/LICENSE

Source:
http://www.netlab.is.tsukuba.ac.jp/~yokota/izumi/dns_balance/

Anything DNS-over-* or DNSCrypt is unsupported among other things that are common practice today. We already have dns/dnsdist that covers all of this and more than "A" records.

A friendly reminder that not everything you decide to touch needs to go into the ports repo
